{{Quote|The job will cost 5,000 credits|Drayk|<ref name="GG7" />}}
'''Drayk''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[abbot]] at the [[Dim-U monastery/Legends|Dim-U monastery]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Drayk was concerned with order and precision, and he controlled the monastery with a military style. Although he was the abbot of the monastery, he was not overly concerned with the belief of [[Dim-U/Legends|Dim-U]], and the monks under his command were involved in an illegal [[transponder]]-[[Slicer/Legends|slicing]] business, using the religious building as a cover. He used a [[GoCorp/Legends|GoCorp]] [[JL7 Elixir Hoverscooter]] for transportation around [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], after a speeder accident rendered him paralysed from the waist down.<ref name="GG7" />

He knew [[Beeyon Nace]], and assisted him after he was blackmailed by [[Kollan Xa]] and the [[Ccalras Corporation]].<ref name="Vested Interest">{{WEGCite|story=Vested Interest|book=Mos Eisley Adventure Set}}</ref>
